'''Totoplat''' was [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] and [[Jiliac Desilijic Tiron|Jiliac's]] chef at their residence on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] and occasionally accompanied them on trips.
